Multi-agent code review. Free. No login required.

Catch bugs in AI-generated code before they ship.

Paste code from ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, or Copilot. Two AI models review it together to catch what one would miss.

Ctrl+Enter to submit

How it works

Three steps from paste to production-ready code review.

01

Paste code

From ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, or any AI coding tool. We auto-detect the language.

02

Multi-agent review

Two specialized models analyze your code independently, then cross-check findings.

03

Get results

Issues ranked by severity with fix suggestions. See what a single model would miss.

Live demo

See AI teams collaborate in real time

Watch a Lead, Builder, Reviewer, and Tester work together to build a JWT authentication module. All in under 30 seconds.

Benchmarks

98.5% detection rate across 1,200+ samples

Multi-agent review catches 36% more security issues and 20% more logic bugs than single-model review. See the full methodology.

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about multi-agent code review.

ChatGPT gives you one opinion. AgentForge runs two separate AI models that cross-check each other. One might catch a security flaw the other misses. The result is higher confidence, fewer false positives.

No. Paste code and get a review instantly. If you want to create AI teams and run full tasks, you can set up an account.

Code is analyzed in memory and stored only for the duration of the review. Review history is kept locally in your browser.

We use two specialized models—one focused on correctness and security, the other on best practices and edge cases. Both are optimized for code analysis.

Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, C++, and more. The models auto-detect the language.

Most reviews complete in under 60 seconds. Complex codebases may take up to 2 minutes.

AgentForge

Multi-agent code review for the AI era. © 2026
